extension.disclaimer: All the streams on this add-on are hosted on the third party site and uploaded by other people. We are not responsible for any content that hosted on on the third-party sites. If you have any legal issues please contact appropriate video owners hosters.
extension.news: [B]v0.1.88.4[/B] 20/07/2026 - nexa/vertex: auto-retry across mirror sub-domains (s1/s2/s3) when a channel's embed host blanks the stream, so channels that route to TLS-gated hosts still play - unified ppcfg/char-array/econfig extraction with per-mirror diagnostic logging
